title: add hetzner-node skill + cloud-init variants for all roles
description:
## Summary

- Adds `.claude/skills/hetzner-node/SKILL.md` — `/hetzner-node` skill: interactive 6-phase runbook for provisioning new Hetzner nodes or resetting existing ones via Rescue Mode
- Updates `prod/cloud-init.yaml`: adds `gekko` user (with SSH key), fixes `AllowUsers` to include both `patrick` and `gekko`, adds `wireguard-tools` package
- Adds `prod/cloud-init-join-cp.yaml`: control-plane join variant with `flannel-iface: wg-mesh` and template placeholders for server URL + token
- Adds `prod/cloud-init-worker.yaml`: worker/agent variant with same user setup

## Skill phases

0. Input (mode, role, IP, env, WireGuard IP)
1. Cloud-config generation with placeholder substitution
2a. New node: `hcloud server create --user-data-from-file`
2b. Reset: Rescue Mode → `installimage` → inject cloud-init → reboot
3. Wait for SSH poll loop
4. WireGuard: keygen, build `wg-mesh.conf`, deploy via SCP, add peers on existing nodes
5. k3s join verification + node labelling
6. `task health` + permanent config updates

## Test plan

- [ ] `prod/cloud-init.yaml` validates with `cloud-init schema --config-file prod/cloud-init.yaml` (if cloud-init CLI available)
- [ ] `/hetzner-node` skill is auto-discovered in new Claude Code sessions
- [ ] No manifest changes — existing `task test:all` results unchanged
